title: Aggregate data through the V2 API
excerpt:
Hi, 
Does anyone know if aggregate data can be queried through the API?

posts.author: PaulCJ (Paul CJ)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

Does anyone know if aggregate data can be queried through the API?

posts.author: dsilva (Daniel Silva)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @PaulCJ,

Could you expand a bit more on the kind of data you’re trying to retrieve? If you could give us a bit more info on your use case here we can assist.

-Daniel

posts.author: PaulCJ (Paul CJ)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @dsilva. I was wondering if you could effectively run computations through the API to return just those calculated values, rather than returning the full dataset and to be processed locally. But I think I’m probably approaching the problem in the wrong way.

Paul

posts.author: Helen (Helen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Not sure if you’ve had a chance to solve this yet, but all computations would need to be done locally!

Feel free to start a different thread if you have any other questions.
